events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: an expired confined-space permit voids entry authorization immediately under OSHA 1910.146(d)(3)/(e)(6) — this is a `fail`, `critical` risk. Correct sequence is stop work → evacuate → account for entrants → terminate/cancel the expired permit → re-test atmosphere and re-verify isolation/ventilation/rescue provisions → entry supervisor issues a new permit → only then resume entry.
